    I Feel.

    I feel like, feel like, swirling my finger on your foot, dragging it through the thigh, slowly rubbing the hips, continuing, touching the back, feeling the texture and gently caressing the hairs while you lay down on your chest.

    Tags: Intimacy, Literary, Prose, Reflections

    Categories: Literary

    Updated: July 21, 2026
